uses: Crocion eriocarpum is used in traditional medicine for its supposed antimalarial properties, particularly in the treatment of malaria caused by Plasmodium species. Its extracts are believed to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its potential medicinal applications. Additionally, research has suggested that Crocion eriocarpum may exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a subject of interest for further study.
